goal: Create the internal namespace package for the transfer surface and route transfer-facing CLI imports through it without changing transfer behavior.
constraints: Do not move transfer implementation files yet
behavioral_changes: The repo now has an internal namespace package for the transfer surface.
Transfer-facing CLI imports now depend on that namespace instead of direct imports from transfer.py.
verification_targets: PYTHONPATH=src python -c "import chip_labs.cli; from chip_labs.transfer_surface import transfer_intelligence, apply_pattern"
follow_up: Apply the same namespace-first pattern to the intelligence-serving surface.
Move transfer implementation files only after internal callers are consistently routed through the namespace.
